name: Japan
interesting_fact: Japan is home to the world’s busiest pedestrian crossing, the Shibuya Crossing.

name: Canada
interesting_fact: Canada has the longest coastline of any country in the world.

name: Brazil
interesting_fact: Brazil is the only country in South America where Portuguese is the official language.

name: Australia
interesting_fact: Australia is home to more kangaroos than people.

name: Egypt
interesting_fact: Egypt’s pyramids are the only remaining Ancient World Wonders.

name: Germany
interesting_fact: Germany is home to over 25,000 castles.

name: India
interesting_fact: India is the world’s largest democracy.

name: Mexico
interesting_fact: Mexico introduced chocolate to the world through the ancient Aztecs.

name: South Africa
interesting_fact: South Africa has three official capital cities.
